message:
feat(wizard): add headless browser auth flow explanation

Adds a prominent AlertCard in the status-check page explaining how
authentication works on a headless VPS:
- Import Laptop icon from lucide-react
- Add info AlertCard before auth commands explaining the device flow
- Step-by-step: run command -> copy URL -> open in laptop browser -> login
- Addresses "Opening browser..." confusion for headless environments
- Remove redundant paragraph (info now in AlertCard)

Closes: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-dmff
